## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing with new articles and refreshes, despite recent team changes](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [New strategy focuses on long-tail keywords and hyper-specific content to combat AI-driven traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Plans to implement schema markup and explore "surround sound SEO" tactics for improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Shift observed from branded Google traffic to AI platforms, while non-branded Google traffic continues to grow](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [New articles and refreshes are being published, with Teandra ramping up to catch up on outstanding work](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Five additional articles and two refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Team is prioritizing long-tail search queries based on AI platform data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### SEO Performance and Dashboards

  - [Traffic on new articles showing positive trends, with about 50 clicks per day](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Looker Studio dashboard development faced challenges, but will be delivered by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Google Analytics dashboard created to monitor overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### Page Optimization Strategy

  - [Proposed improvements for connector and "how to sync" pages, including new sections like FAQs, pairings, and scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Plans to create more modular, conversion-focused landing pages similar to Zapier's approach](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Discussion on automating image creation for scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

### AI and SEO Adaptation

  - [20% drop in organic traffic observed from January to present, likely due to AI search impact](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Focus on implementing schema markup and other AI-friendly optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Strategy to create hyper-specific content with detailed information, step-by-step guides, and industry expert quotes](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Exploration of "surround sound SEO" tactics, including presence on platforms like Reddit and Quora](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Content Distribution and Repurposing

  - [Suggestion to create AI-generated video shorts and avatars to discuss blog content](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Plans to develop a content flywheel by repurposing podcast-style content into various formats](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to schedule a meeting with Tanmay on Monday to dive deeper into page optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Team to continue updating on published blogs as they catch up with the backlog](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Looker Studio dashboard to be delivered Monday morning](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Explore implementation of schema markup and AI-friendly optimizations across content](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Investigate "surround sound SEO" tactics and brand mention tracking in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Consider developing a content repurposing strategy using AI-generated video shorts and avatars](https://fathom.video/share/sxbTmaquXv1xWMvKohNexQN7ZJqZP3ud?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
